sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: These Analysts Increase Their Forecasts On Landstar System Following Strong Q1 Results
feed.summary: Landstar System Inc (NASDAQ: LSTR) reported stronger-than-expected earnings and sales for the first quarter, surpassing analyst consensus estimates. Following these positive results, several analysts revised their price targets for Landstar System upwards, although most maintained a "Hold" or "Neutral" rating. The company's shares increased by 2.4% after the announcement.

feed.title: Vanguard Capital Management (NASDAQ: MTCH) reports 12.25M-share stake
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a beneficial ownership of 12,246,536 shares, or a 5.26% stake, in Match Group Inc. (NASDAQ: MTCH) as detailed in a Schedule 13G SEC filing for the reporting period ending March 31, 2026. This passive investment grants Vanguard sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power for 1,783,999 shares. The filing indicates Vanguard's neutral stance as a large passive institutional investor with significant influence.

feed.title: NextEra to Develop 3 GW of Solar for Salt River Project
feed.summary: NextEra Energy Resources has entered an agreement with Salt River Project (SRP) to develop 3 GW of solar generation for the Arizona utility by the end of 2034. This significant expansion will nearly double SRP's existing solar capacity of 1.5 GW, supporting the utility's goal to increase its clean energy resources. The partnership highlights a major investment in utility-scale solar within the Desert Southwest region.

feed.title: Vest Financial LLC Decreases Holdings in EOG Resources, Inc. $EOG

Despite this, other institutional investors have recently increased their holdings in EOG Resources. The article also details the company's price performance, recent dividend announcement, analyst ratings, and insider trading activity.

feed.title: Every Man Jack Launches Limited-Edition Grooming Collection with John Deere, Exclusively at Walmart
feed.summary: Every Man Jack has partnered with John Deere to launch a limited-edition grooming collection exclusively at Walmart. The collection features clean, performance-driven essentials like body wash, antiperspirant, and 2-in-1 shampoo and conditioner, with scent profiles inspired by working outdoors. This collaboration aims to celebrate hard work and provide high-quality grooming products for men who "Work Dirty. Clean Easy."

feed.title: 17 ignition risks caught early: PG&E opens grid watch center
feed.summary: PG&E has opened a Continuous Monitoring Center (CMC) in San Ramon to proactively prevent wildfires and outages by centralizing real-time grid monitoring, machine learning, and field response. In 2025, the CMC intercepted 17 potential ignitions, avoided 12 million minutes of unplanned outages, and saved approximately $6 million in operational costs. This initiative integrates data from 5.5 million smart meters and tens of thousands of sensors to enhance safety and reliability.

feed.title: Ferrari fans get AI guide, live quizzes and deeper race data
feed.summary: IBM has launched new AI-powered features for the Scuderia Ferrari app, built with watsonx, including an AI Companion, Game Center with quizzes and leaderboards, and enhanced race data. Since its relaunch in May 2025, the app has seen significant increases in downloads and active users. These updates aim to deepen fan engagement and showcase IBM's AI capabilities in real-world applications.

feed.title: Stifel Nicolaus Keeps Their Buy Rating on IDEX (IEX)
feed.summary: Stifel Nicolaus analyst Nathan Jones reiterated a Buy rating on IDEX (IEX) with a price target of $250.00. This follows similar optimism from Citi, while BMO Capital maintained a Hold rating. IDEX reported strong first-quarter earnings, with revenue of $886.9 million and a net profit of $120 million, prompting Baird and Citi to also raise their price targets.

feed.title: Travelers Launches AI-Powered Claims Intelligence Tool in e-CARMA®
feed.summary: Travelers has launched Claim Insights, a new AI-powered tool within its e-CARMA® risk management platform. This innovation helps risk managers more quickly identify, understand, and act on critical claims by optimizing analysis, prioritizing actions, and streamlining management. The tool aims to enhance efficiency and control over claims outcomes for businesses.

feed.title: Salesforce is changing how investors will track its 2027 revenue
feed.summary: Salesforce (NYSE: CRM) has announced updates to its disaggregated revenue reporting structure for fiscal year 2027. The company will now report revenue in two primary categories: Agentforce Apps and Data 360, Platform & Other, reflecting the evolution of its product architecture towards the "Agentic Enterprise." To ensure comparability, Salesforce is providing recast disaggregated revenue data for fiscal years 2025 and 2026.

feed.title: MEDP Shareholder Alert: Investors With Losses May Seek to
feed.summary: The Gross Law Firm has issued a shareholder alert for Medpace Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: MEDP) after the company's stock dramatically declined following an announcement of a lower-than-projected book-to-bill ratio. Investors who purchased shares between April 22, 2025, and February 9, 2026, are encouraged to contact the firm regarding potential lead plaintiff appointment in a securities class action lawsuit. The deadline to seek lead plaintiff status is June 8, 2026.

feed.title: EOG Resources, Inc. $EOG Stock Position Lessened by Wealthfront Advisers LLC
feed.summary: Wealthfront Advisers LLC reduced its stake in EOG Resources (NYSE:EOG) by 19.9% in the 4th quarter, selling 11,773 shares and retaining 47,254 shares valued at $4.96 million. Despite this, EOG reported an earnings beat with $2.27 EPS against $2.20 expected and $5.64 billion in revenue. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target of $153.68, even as insiders, including the COO and CFO, sold shares totaling around $2.52 million last quarter.

feed.title: Moderna Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Provides Business Updates
feed.summary: Moderna reported its first quarter 2026 financial results, with significant revenue growth ($0.4 billion, 80% from international markets) despite a GAAP net loss of $(1.3) billion due to a non-recurring litigation settlement charge. The company reiterated its plan for up to 10% revenue growth and GAAP operating expense reductions in 2026. Key business updates include regulatory approvals in Europe for its flu plus COVID combination vaccine (mCOMBRIAX) and the initiation of a Phase 3 study for intismeran autogene in non-small cell lung cancer.

feed.title: Occidental names COO Richard Jackson as next CEO
feed.summary: Richard Jackson, current Senior Vice President and COO of Occidental Petroleum Corp., has been named as the successor to Vicki Hollub as President and Chief Executive Officer, effective June 1. Hollub will retire after leading the company since 2016 but will remain on the board. Jackson's appointment is part of a planned transition following a decade-long strategic overhaul of the company.

feed.title: Wealthfront Advisers LLC Purchases 2,202 Shares of Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. $REGN
feed.summary: Wealthfront Advisers LLC increased its stake in Regeneron Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:REGN) by 37.1% during Q4, acquiring an additional 2,202 shares to bring its total holdings to 8,142 shares valued at approximately $6.285 million. Regeneron Pharmaceuticals reported strong Q1 results, beating analyst expectations with $3.61 billion in revenue and $9.47 EPS, and announced a $3 billion share buyback program along with a quarterly dividend of $0.94. Despite these positive financial results and shareholder-friendly actions, the stock faces some headwinds due to weaker Eylea sales and a decline in GAAP net income.

feed.title: Wealthfront Advisers LLC Has $5.82 Million Stock Holdings in CenterPoint Energy, Inc. $CNP

feed.title: Xcel Energy Inc. (NASDAQ:XEL) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Xcel Energy Inc. (NASDAQ: XEL) reported strong ongoing earnings of $0.91 per share for Q1 2026, exceeding expectations. The company highlighted significant investments in new infrastructure, progress on securing large data center loads, including a landmark agreement with Google, and its commitment to a clean energy transition. Xcel Energy reaffirmed its 2026 ongoing EPS guidance and long-term earnings growth targets, emphasizing its ability to fund accretive growth while maintaining a strong balance sheet.

feed.title: Textron Inc. (NYSE:TXT) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Textron Inc. reported a strong Q1 2026, with revenue up 12% to $3.7 billion and segment profit up 10% to $320 million. The company announced its intent to separate its Industrial segment from its Aerospace & Defense (A&D) businesses within 12 to 18 months, aiming to establish New Textron as a pure-play A&D company. This strategic move is expected to drive long-term value by enhancing clarity in capital allocation, increasing growth potential, and aligning with highly attractive end markets for its A&D franchises.

feed.title: Cboe stock jumps after unveiling headcount cut, trimming opex guidance (CBOE:BATS)
feed.summary: Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) stock rose over 5% in premarket trading after the company announced a 20% workforce reduction and lowered its operating expense guidance for the year. This move is expected to improve profitability and contribute to the company's raised organic net revenue growth outlook for 2026. The announcement follows a strong Q1, where Cboe exceeded analyst estimates for adjusted EPS and net revenue.

feed.title: Air Products and Chemicals, Inc. (NYSE:APD) Q2 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Air Products and Chemicals, Inc. (NYSE: APD) reported strong Q2 2026 earnings, exceeding expectations with EPS of $3.20, an 19% increase year-over-year. The company raised its full-year EPS guidance to $13 to $13.25, reflecting improved volumes, productivity, and new asset contributions, particularly in electronics and aerospace. Despite uncertainties from the Middle East conflict affecting helium supply, Air Products highlighted its resilient supply chain and commitment to capital discipline, including a significant investment in manufacturing for Samsung in South Korea.

feed.title: Illinois Tool Works Inc. (NYSE:ITW) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Illinois Tool Works Inc. (ITW) reported a strong first quarter for 2026, exceeding earnings expectations with EPS of $2.66. The company saw robust performance in CapEx-related segments like Welding and Test & Measurement, while also managing challenges in consumer-facing markets. ITW raised its full-year GAAP EPS guidance to $11.10 to $11.50, driven by solid Q1 results and continued operational discipline and enterprise initiatives.

feed.title: VICI Properties Closes $1.16 Billion Golden Entertainment Sale-Leaseback Deal
feed.summary: VICI Properties Inc. has completed its $1.16 billion acquisition of the land, real estate, and improvements for seven Golden Entertainment casino properties. The transaction is structured as a sale-leaseback, with a newly formed entity controlled by Blake L. Sartini leasing and operating the casinos. This deal expands VICI's presence in Nevada's local gaming market and aligns with Golden Entertainment's strategy to focus on core operations as a private company.

feed.title: Occidental names veteran Richard Jackson as CEO, Vicki Hollub to retire
feed.summary: Occidental Petroleum announced that CEO Vicki Hollub will retire next month, with Richard Jackson, currently the chief operating officer, stepping in as the new CEO. Hollub's tenure was marked by the controversial 2019 acquisition of Anadarko Petroleum and a focus on debt reduction and asset sales. Jackson will join the board effective June 1, while Hollub will continue to serve on the board after her retirement.

feed.title: Methanex Reports on Annual General Meeting of Shareholders
feed.summary: Methanex Corporation announced the results from its Annual General Meeting of Shareholders held on May 1, 2026. Shareholders approved the re-election of all twelve director nominees, the appointment of KPMG LLP as auditors, and an advisory resolution on executive compensation. The meeting also included a presentation by the President and CEO, Rich Sumner.

feed.title: Littelfuse (LFUS) SVP Maggie Chu sells 1,097 shares under 10b5-1 plan

Following these transactions, Maggie Chu directly holds 6,001 shares of Littelfuse Common Stock.

feed.title: Iron Mountain Incorporated (NYSE:IRM) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Iron Mountain (NYSE:IRM) reported extremely strong first-quarter 2026 results, exceeding revenue, adjusted EBITDA, and AFFO expectations with 22% year-over-year growth across all three metrics. The company's growth businesses, including data centers, ALM, and digital solutions, were key drivers, growing over 50% and now comprising more than 30% of total revenue. Following this performance, Iron Mountain raised its full-year financial outlook for 2026, anticipating continued double-digit growth.
